meaning: vt.使一致,使遵守,使顺从vi.符合,相似,适应环境adj.一致的,顺从的
examples: The building does not conform with safety regulations.
The lamp has been designed to conform to new safety standards.
This mark signifies that the products conform to an approved standard.
Almost all such conferences conform to a tired formula in which there is no conferring.
In other words, they do not conform in the slightest to the popular stereotype.
